x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Creates c# classes from a Contentful content model.

options.name: --api-key
options.description: The Contentful API key for the Content Delivery API

options.name: --space-id
options.description: The space id to fetch content types from

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace the classes should be created in

options.name: --environment
options.description: The environment to fetch the content model from

options.name: --force
options.description: Automatically overwrite files that already exist

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to the file or directory to create files in
